SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.sqlite

Class SqliteConnectionPool

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.sqlite.SqliteConnectionPool
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class SqliteConnectionPool extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Handle to a SQLite connection pool, from which RustTableProvider and RustCatalogProvider instances can be opened.

Backed by datafusion_table_providers::sql::db_connection_pool::sqlitepool:: SqliteConnectionPool (compiled with the bundled feature — no system SQLite needed). The upstream sqlite-federation feature is also enabled, so every table opened through this pool is federation-aware: combine with SessionContext.newWithFederation(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ConfigOptions) to get filter/projection/join pushdown into SQLite automatically. 

try (SqliteConnectionPool pool = SqliteConnectionPool.memory();
    RustTableProvider users = pool.openTable("users");
    SessionContext ctx = new SessionContext()) {
    ctx.registerTable("users", users);
    ctx.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM users").show();
}
See Also:
  • Rust datafusion-table-providers: SqliteConnectionPool

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_BUSY_TIMEOUT

      public static final Duration DEFAULT_BUSY_TIMEOUT
      Default busy timeout applied when none is specified.

  • Method Details

    • memory

      public static SqliteConnectionPool memory()
      Open an in-memory SQLite database with the default busy timeout.

    • file

      public static SqliteConnectionPool file(String path)
      Open (or create) a SQLite file at path with the default busy timeout.

    • open

      public static SqliteConnectionPool open(String path, SqliteConnectionPool.Mode mode, Duration busyTimeout)
      Open a SQLite database.
      Parameters:
      path - filesystem path (ignored for SqliteConnectionPool.Mode.MEMORY)
      mode - SqliteConnectionPool.Mode.MEMORY or SqliteConnectionPool.Mode.FILE
      busyTimeout - SQLite busy timeout

    • openTable

      public RustTableProvider openTable(String tableName)
      Opens the named table. The result can be registered via SessionContext.registerTable. 
      try (RustTableProvider t = pool.openTable("customers")) {
    ctx.registerTable("customers", t);
    ctx.sql("SELECT * FROM customers").show();
}
      See Also:
      • Rust datafusion-table-providers: SqliteTableFactory::table_provider

    • openCatalog

      public RustCatalogProvider openCatalog()
      Opens the whole database as a RustCatalogProvider — one schema per SQLite schema, one table per SQLite table. Suitable for SessionContext.registerCatalog. 
      try (RustCatalogProvider catalog = pool.openCatalog()) {
    ctx.registerCatalog("sqlite", catalog);
    ctx.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM sqlite.main.customers").show();
}
      See Also:
      • Rust datafusion-table-providers: DatabaseCatalogProvider::try_new

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
